ddls:
CREATE TABLE "upgrades" (
  "upgrade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each upgrade */,
  "upgrade_name" TEXT /* Name of the upgrade */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the upgrade */,
  "require_level" INTEGER /* Minimum level required to perform the upgrade */,
  "add_property" INTEGER /* Additional properties gained from the upgrade */,
  "cost" INTEGER /* Cost of the upgrade in game currency */,
  "effect_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the effects of the upgrade */,
  "is_locked" INTEGER /* Indicates if the upgrade is initially locked */,
  "unlock_condition" TEXT /* Condition to unlock the upgrade */,
  "language_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the language of the upgrade */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("upgrade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_upgrades_require_level FOREIGN KEY ("require_level") REFERENCES players ("level"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_upgrades_language_id FOREIGN KEY ("language_id") REFERENCES language_support ("language_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cost_items" (
  "cost_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cost item */,
  "cost_item_name" TEXT /* Name of the cost item */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the cost item */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category of the cost item */,
  "rarity" TEXT /* Rarity of the cost item */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to the image of the cost item */,
  "is_stackable" INTEGER /* Indicates if the item can be stacked in the inventory */,
  "stack_size" INTEGER /* Maximum stack size of the item */,
  "language_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the language of the cost item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cost_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cost_items_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cost_items_language_id FOREIGN KEY ("language_id") REFERENCES language_support ("language_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent category */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to the image of the category */,
  "language_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the language of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_categories_parent_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_categories_language_id FOREIGN KEY ("language_id") REFERENCES language_support ("language_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "upgrade_requirements" (
  "requirement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each requirement */,
  "upgrade_id" INTEGER /* ID of the upgrade */,
  "cost_item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cost item required for the upgrade */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the cost item required */,
  "is_optional" INTEGER /* Indicates if the requirement is optional */,
  "language_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the language of the requirement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("requirement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_upgrade_requirements_cost_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("cost_item_id") REFERENCES cost_items ("cost_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_upgrade_requirements_upgrade_id FOREIGN KEY ("upgrade_id") REFERENCES upgrades ("upgrade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_upgrade_requirements_language_id FOREIGN KEY ("language_id") REFERENCES language_support ("language_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "level" INTEGER /* Current level of the player */,
  "experience_points" INTEGER /* Experience points earned by the player */,
  "account_creation_date" TEXT /* Date the player account was created */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the player's last login */,
  "total_play_time" INTEGER /* Total play time of the player in seconds */,
  "language_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player's preferred language */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_language_id FOREIGN KEY ("language_id") REFERENCES language_support ("language_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_inventories" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory item */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "cost_item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cost item in the inventory */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the cost item in the inventory */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the inventory was last updated */,
  "language_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the language of the inventory */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_inventories_cost_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("cost_item_id") REFERENCES cost_items ("cost_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_inventories_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_inventories_language_id FOREIGN KEY ("language_id") REFERENCES language_support ("language_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_upgrades" (
  "player_upgrade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player upgrade */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "upgrade_id" INTEGER /* ID of the upgrade performed */,
  "upgrade_date" TEXT /* Date the upgrade was performed */,
  "upgrade_level" INTEGER /* Level of the upgrade */,
  "language_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the language of the upgrade */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_upgrade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_upgrades_upgrade_id FOREIGN KEY ("upgrade_id") REFERENCES upgrades ("upgrade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_upgrades_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_upgrades_language_id FOREIGN KEY ("language_id") REFERENCES language_support ("language_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game session */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the session */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the session */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the session in seconds */,
  "session_type" TEXT /* Type of session */,
  "language_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the language of the session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_sessions_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_sessions_language_id FOREIGN KEY ("language_id") REFERENCES language_support ("language_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "language_support" (
  "language_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each language */,
  "language_code" TEXT /* Language code (e.g., en, fr, es) */,
  "language_name" TEXT /* Name of the language */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the language is active and supported */,
  "locale" TEXT /* Locale for the language */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("language_id")
)
